operatorPrerequisites: Review account-linking readiness before enabling future Alexa-facing flows.
notes: Wave 2 only declares onboarding and readiness for Alexa.

operatorPrerequisites: Map Apple-facing entities into Home Assistant before depending on Apple Home naming.
notes: Wave 2 keeps Apple Home on the Home Assistant-first path.

operatorPrerequisites: Configure HomeKit bridge or controller support in Home Assistant before using HomeKit-backed entities.
notes: Wave 2 keeps HomeKit on the Home Assistant-first path.

operatorPrerequisites: Expose Xiaomi or Mi Home devices in Home Assistant before scene routing depends on them.
notes: Wave 2 declares Xiaomi and Mi Home support through Home Assistant-first routing.

operatorPrerequisites: Ensure Matter devices are already visible in Home Assistant before using Mira scene bindings.
notes: Wave 2 keeps Matter on the Home Assistant-first path.

operatorPrerequisites: Expose Aqara devices through Home Assistant before depending on Aqara household roles.
notes: Wave 2 keeps Aqara on the Home Assistant-first path.

operatorPrerequisites: Expose Tuya or Smart Life devices through Home Assistant before Mira scene routing depends on them.
notes: Wave 2 keeps Tuya and Smart Life on the Home Assistant-first path.

operatorPrerequisites: Expose SwitchBot devices through Home Assistant before using SwitchBot roles in scenes.
notes: Wave 2 keeps SwitchBot on the Home Assistant-first path.

operatorPrerequisites: Keep Home Assistant as the default path for Hue in the current release.
Only enable direct Hue bridge access deliberately with a bridge URL and application key.
notes: A release-side Hue direct-adapter runtime package now exists under modules/home-assistant/direct-adapters/hue/.
That package remains optional and does not replace the default Home Assistant route.

operatorPrerequisites: Expose Google Home or Nest devices through Home Assistant-backed entities before Mira depends on them.
notes: Wave 2 keeps Google Home and Nest on the Home Assistant-first path.

operatorPrerequisites: Expose Lutron devices through Home Assistant before Mira scene routing depends on them.
notes: Wave 2 keeps Lutron on the Home Assistant-first path.

operatorPrerequisites: Expose SmartThings devices through Home Assistant before using SmartThings household roles in Mira.
notes: Wave 2 keeps SmartThings on the Home Assistant-first path.
